twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.description: Add a second step at sign-in using an authenticator app.
twoFactor.masterIntro: One permanent code that always works to sign in or to turn off two-factor authentication. It is never used up. Store it somewhere very safe — anyone with it can bypass 2FA.
twoFactor.masterRegenPrompt: Enter a code from your authenticator app or a backup code to generate a new master code. Your old master code will stop working.
twoFactor.setupScan: Scan this QR code with an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, Authy, 1Password…).
twoFactor.setupManual: Can't scan? Enter this setup key manually:
twoFactor.setupVerify: Enter the 6-digit code from your app to finish:
twoFactor.backupWarning: Each code works once. Keep them somewhere safe — they let you sign in if you lose your authenticator.
twoFactor.disablePrompt: Enter a code from your authenticator app or a backup code to turn off two-factor authentication.
twoFactor.regeneratePrompt: Enter a code from your authenticator app or a backup code to generate a new set. Your old backup codes will stop working.
twoFactor.invalidCode: That code isn't valid. Try again.

account.title: Account
account.subtitle: Manage your personal details, security, and preferences.
account.passwordIntro: We'll email a reset link to {email}. Follow it to set a new password.
account.twoFactorIntro: Require a one-time code from an authenticator app when you sign in.
account.linkedIntro: The ways you can sign in to this account.
account.dangerIntro: Permanently close your account. You'll be signed out and will need a new invitation or join request to access organizations again.
account.deleteDialogWarn: This archives your user record. This action cannot be undone from the app.
account.closeIntro: Close your account permanently. You'll be signed out and will need a new invitation to return.

emails.title: Email addresses
emails.intro: Your primary email is used to sign in. Add others for recovery or external sign-in.
emails.enterCodeHint: Enter the code we sent to this address.
emails.codeSentDetail: Check the inbox for the verification code.
emails.taken: This email is already in use.
emails.invalidCode: That code isn't valid. Try again.
emails.oauthManaged: Your primary email is managed by your sign-in provider and can't be changed.
emails.connectIntro: Connect an external account to sign in with it and add its email.

switchAccount.title: Switch account
switchAccount.subtitle: Choose an account saved on this device.
switchAccount.empty: No saved accounts on this device.

workspace.emptyHint: No workspaces yet. Create one to get started.

organizations.subtitle: Manage your organizations and choose which one you're working in.
organizations.emptyHint: You don't belong to any organization yet.

orgSettings.title: Organization Settings
orgSettings.subtitle: Configure organization-wide behavior and policies.
orgSettings.noPermission: You do not have permission to edit organization settings.
orgSettings.joinPolicyOpenOption: Open — anyone can submit a join request
orgSettings.joinPolicyInviteOnlyOption: Invite only — join requests are blocked
orgSettings.joinPolicyHint: When set to Invite only, users cannot submit join requests — only invited users can join.
orgSettings.defaultRoleHint: Role assigned to new members when no specific role is specified (join request approvals, default invitations).

wsSettings.title: Workspace Settings
wsSettings.subtitle: Configure how this workspace behaves for all its members.
wsSettings.noPermission: You do not have permission to edit workspace settings.
wsSettings.riskScoringHint: ML-based closure and churn scores are shown on deals in this workspace.
wsSettings.mediumThresholdLabel: Medium risk threshold (0 – 1, must be less than high)

members.title: Members
members.rowHint: Click a row to open the member details view.
members.roleHint: Defaults to Member. The assign_org_roles permission is required to invite as Admin.
members.userCreatedDetail: The new organization account has been created.
members.searchPlaceholder: Search members by name or email

wsMembers.subtitle: Manage workspace members.
wsMembers.addHint: Only users who are already in the parent organization can be added. Invite them to the organization first if they are not listed.
wsMembers.lastAdminError: Cannot remove the last full-authority workspace member.

member.title: Member
member.archiveHint: Archive account requires the Delete Org Users permission and a matching email domain.
member.needWsPermission: You need the manage_org_workspace_members permission to manage workspace access.
member.confirmRemove: Remove this member from the organization?
member.memberRemovedDetail: The user was removed from the organization.
member.confirmArchive: Archive this account? This disables login and removes the user from active use.
member.accountArchivedDetail: The user account has been archived.
member.selectRoleFirst: Please select a workspace role first.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.empty: No audit entries match the current filters.
audit.wsContextRequired: Workspace context is required to view the audit log.
audit.noPermission: You need workspace analytics visibility or equivalent organization-level permissions to view the audit log.

entities.noAccess: You do not have access to this workspace.
entities.emptyTypeLocked: No {type} records yet. This type is maintained automatically and cannot be created here.
entities.emptyType: No {type} records yet. Create one to get started.
entities.emptyAll: No entities yet. Create one to get started.

entityForm.title: Create entity
entityForm.subtitle: Add a new entity to this workspace.
entityForm.noTypes: No record types available. Contact your administrator.
entityForm.noCreatableTypes: No entity types can be created manually. Derived or system-maintained types are hidden here.
entityForm.noMatchingLocked: No matching records in this workspace. This linked type cannot be created from this screen — contact an administrator.
entityForm.noRecordsCreateHint: No records yet — use “Create new {target}” to add one; it will be selected automatically.
entityForm.nestedHint: This saves to your workspace and is linked when you finish the parent record below.
entityForm.invalidWebsite: Enter a valid URL (must start with http:// or https://).
entityForm.selectAllLinks: Select all required links for this record.
entityForm.noCreatePermission: You do not have permission to create entities in this workspace.
entityForm.typeNotCreatable: This entity type cannot be created from the UI.
entityForm.fillBeforeSubmit: Please fill in all fields before submitting.

entityRead.subtitle: Workspace record details and relationships.
entityRead.scoresHint: Closure and churn likelihood, computed by the ML service from this deal's analysis.
entityRead.scoresNotRequested: Scores have not been requested yet.
entityRead.searchByPlaceholder: Search {type} by name, email or id…
entityRead.searchGenericPlaceholder: Search by name, email or id…
entityRead.linkError: Failed to link. Please try again.
entityRead.noExistingLink: No existing link found to reassign.
entityRead.createLinkError: Failed to create and link. Please try again.
entityRead.confirmDelete: Delete this entity? It will be hidden from lists; linked records remain in the workspace.

userList.title: Users
userList.rowHint: Click a row to open the user profile.
userList.empty: No users in this workspace yet.
userList.loadError: Failed to load the user list.

userProfile.title: User profile
userProfile.notFound: User not found in this workspace.
userProfile.adminHint: Change the role and click Save to apply.
userProfile.selfHint: You cannot change your own role.
userProfile.nonAdminHint: Only workspace administrators can change roles.
userProfile.lastAdminError: Cannot remove the last workspace administrator.

home.mlUnavailable: ML scores unavailable (no active deals or ML service offline).

wsSelect.title: Select a workspace
wsSelect.pickInOrg: Pick a workspace in {org} to continue.
wsSelect.createFirst: Create your first workspace to get started.

invitations.title: Invitations and join requests
invitations.subtitle: Organization invitations you can accept, and join requests you have submitted.
invitations.empty: No pending organization invitations or join requests.
invitations.loadJoinRequestsError: Could not load organization join requests.

graph.title: Graph
graph.subtitle: Your full relational context in {org}. Click a node to view or manage it.
graph.selectOrg: Select an organization to see your graph.
graph.noMatchFilters: No nodes match the active filters.
graph.relaxFilters: Clear or relax the filters to see more of the graph.
graph.noDataYet: No data available yet. Add workspaces and entities to populate the graph.
graph.narrowFilters: Try removing a filter or widening the selection. The current combination is too narrow.
graph.deleteMessage: Delete this entity? It will be hidden from lists; linked records remain in the workspace.

auth.welcomeSubtitle: Sign in to continue to Relativa.
auth.emailCheckFailed: Couldn't verify your email. Please try again.
auth.rememberMeInfo: Keeps you signed in on this device after you close the browser. Leave it off on shared or public computers.
auth.resetSuccess: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in.
auth.oauthFailed: We couldn't sign you in with that provider. Please try again.
auth.enterEmailPassword: Please enter your email and password to sign in.
auth.enterValidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.phoneInfo: We use your phone to verify your account and to help you recover access if you lose your password.
auth.birthDateInfo: We collect your date of birth to confirm you meet the minimum age and to help verify your identity.
auth.firstNameTooShort: First name must be at least 2 characters
auth.lastNameTooShort: Last name must be at least 2 characters
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.emailExists: A user with this email already exists.
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.checkInboxBody: If {email} is registered, you'll receive a reset link shortly. Check your spam folder if you don't see it.
auth.resetSubtitle: Choose a strong password for your account.
auth.linkExpiredBody: This password reset link is invalid or has already been used. Reset links expire after 1 hour.
auth.checkEmailBody: We sent a 6-character code to {target}. Enter it below to activate your account.
auth.checkPhoneBody: We texted a 6-character code to {target}. Enter it below to activate your account.
auth.verificationResent: Verification email sent. Check your inbox.
auth.twoFactorBody: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
auth.twoFactorBackupBody: Enter one of your one-time backup codes.
auth.twoFactorInvalid: That code isn't valid. Try again.
auth.emailNotVerified: Please verify your email address before signing in.
auth.verifyingBody: Just a moment while we confirm your email address.
auth.verifiedBody: Your email has been confirmed. You can now sign in.
auth.verifyFailedBody: This verification link is invalid or has expired.

support.title: Contact support
support.sent: Thanks! Your message has been sent.
support.sendFailed: Couldn't send your message. Please try again.

onboarding.title: Get started
onboarding.subtitle: Create a new organization or join an existing one.
onboarding.createHint: Start fresh and invite your team.
onboarding.joinHint: Find an existing organization and request access.
onboarding.joinRequestSent: Join request sent. An administrator will review it.
onboarding.noOrganizationsYet: No organizations yet. Create your first one above.
onboarding.selectOrgHint: Select an organization to manage it.

status.badRequest: The request is invalid. Please check the highlighted fields.
status.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
status.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
status.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
status.unprocessable: The request could not be processed.
status.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please try again in a moment.
status.server: The server encountered an unexpected error. Please try again later.
status.badGateway: The server is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
status.serviceUnavailable: The service is unavailable. Please try again later.
status.gatewayTimeout: The server took too long to respond. Please try again later.

errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.two_factor_required: A two-factor authentication code is required.
errors.email_address_taken: This email address is already in use.
errors.phone_invalid: Please enter a valid phone number.
errors.email_not_verified: Please verify your email address before signing in.
errors.rate_limit_exceeded: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.email_already_exists: An account with this email already exists.
errors.primary_email_oauth_managed: Your primary email is managed by your sign-in provider and can't be changed.
errors.email_not_verified_for_primary: Verify this email before making it your primary address.
errors.primary_email_cannot_remove: You can't remove your primary email.
errors.provider_already_linked: This account is already linked to a different user.
errors.reset_token_invalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
errors.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.birthdate_invalid: Please enter a valid date of birth.
errors.oauth_token_invalid: We couldn't verify your sign-in provider. Please try again.
errors.oauth_missing_claims: Your sign-in provider didn't return the required information.
errors.oauth_audience_mismatch: This sign-in could not be verified for this application.
errors.already_org_member: You are already a member of this organization.
errors.already_ws_member: This user is already a member of this workspace.
errors.archive_own_account_via_account: Close your own account from account settings.
errors.archive_same_domain_only: You can only archive users with the same email domain.
errors.archive_workspace_admins_only: Only workspace admins or organization owners can archive a workspace.
errors.caller_user_not_found: Your user account was not found.
errors.cancel_own_join_only: You can only cancel your own join requests.
errors.cannot_demote_last_admin: You can't demote the last workspace admin.
errors.cannot_link_archived_entity: You can't link an archived entity.
errors.cannot_unlink_required_relationship: This link can't be removed because the entity requires at least one.
errors.default_org_role_not_found: The default organization role was not found.
errors.default_org_role_not_in_org: The default organization role doesn't belong to this organization.
errors.edit_own_profile_via_account: Edit your own profile from account settings.
errors.entity_all_readonly_delete: This entity can't be deleted because all its properties are read-only.
errors.entity_all_readonly_link: This entity can't be linked because all its properties are read-only.
errors.entity_all_readonly_unlink: This entity can't be unlinked because all its properties are read-only.
errors.entity_type_all_readonly: This entity type can't be created because all its properties are read-only.
errors.entity_type_not_found: Entity type not found or has no properties.
errors.entity_type_required_for_filters: An entity type is required when filters are specified.
errors.entity_wrong_type_for_relationship: The entity type doesn't match this relationship.
errors.insufficient_role_authority: You can't perform this action on a member with equal or higher authority.
errors.invalid_allowed_value: That value isn't allowed for this property.
errors.invalid_decision: Decision must be approved or rejected.
errors.invalid_permission_ids: One or more permissions are invalid.
errors.invitation_already_pending: A pending invitation for this email already exists.
errors.invitation_cannot_resend: This invitation can't be resent in its current state.
errors.invitation_email_mismatch: This invitation was sent to a different email address.
errors.invitation_not_found_or_expired: The invitation was not found or has expired.
errors.invitation_not_pending: This invitation is no longer pending.
errors.join_request_not_pending: This join request is no longer pending.
errors.join_request_pending: You already have a pending join request for this organization.
errors.no_system_org_role: No system organization role is configured.
errors.not_org_member: You are not a member of this organization.
errors.not_ws_member: You are not a member of this workspace.
errors.org_not_accepting_joins: This organization isn't accepting join requests.
errors.permission_denied: You don't have permission to perform this action.
errors.properties_not_in_entity_type: Some properties don't belong to this entity type.
errors.property_expects_boolean: This property expects true or false.
errors.property_expects_decimal: This property expects a decimal number.
errors.property_expects_integer: This property expects a whole number.
errors.property_not_in_entity_type: That property doesn't belong to this entity type.
errors.relationship_archived_entity: You can't create a relationship involving an archived entity.
errors.relationship_not_in_workspace: This relationship doesn't belong to an entity in this workspace.
errors.relationship_type_invalid_for_entity: That relationship type isn't valid for this entity type.
errors.relink_exactly_one_endpoint: Provide exactly one of a new source or target entity.
errors.required_string_empty: Some required text fields are empty.
errors.role_not_in_organization: That role does not belong to this organization.
errors.role_not_in_workspace: That role does not belong to this workspace.
errors.source_cardinality_violation: The source entity already has this link.
errors.source_entity_not_found: The source entity was not found in this workspace.
errors.source_entity_wrong_type: The source entity has the wrong type for this relationship.
errors.system_ws_admin_role_not_found: The system workspace admin role was not found.
errors.target_cardinality_violation: The target entity already has this link.
errors.target_entity_not_found: The target entity was not found in this workspace.
errors.target_entity_wrong_type: The target entity has the wrong type for this relationship.
errors.target_not_org_member: That user is not a member of this organization.
errors.target_not_ws_member: That user is not a member of this workspace.
errors.entity_not_in_workspace: That entity isn't part of this workspace.
errors.audit_forbidden_user: You aren't allowed to view audit history for this user.
